import Slider from "react-slick"; import "slick-carousel/slick/slick.css"; import "slick-carousel/slick/slick-theme.css"; import "./HomePage.css"; const HomePage = () => { const settings = { dots: true, infinite: false, speed: 500, slidesToShow: 4, slidesToScroll: 4, initialSlide: 0, responsive: [ { breakpoint: 1024, settings: { slidesToShow: 3, slidesToScroll: 3, infinite: true, dots: true } }, { breakpoint: 600, settings: { slidesToShow: 2, slidesToScroll: 2, initialSlide: 2 } }, { breakpoint: 480, settings: { slidesToShow: 1, slidesToScroll: 1 } } ] }; return(
